reforms.description: The new Administration's national energy policy report emphasizes the need to expand production and improve transmission infrastructure, pledging tax credits and research support for energy-related projects.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The expansion of energy production and infrastructure is expected to stimulate economic activity and innovation in the energy sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into action as part of the national energy policy.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant policy change in national energy strategy, focusing on R&D and infrastructure.
reforms.source_quote: The plan pledged to ease the regulatory climate facing energy producers, including environmental protection rules, and to provide tax credits and research support for a variety of energy-related projects.

reforms.description: The research credit was modified to provide up to $25,000 of new capital equipment deductions for small businesses with profits below $200,000, aiming to stimulate R&D investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing small businesses to invest in R&D, this reform is expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The modification of the research credit has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform modifies existing tax credits to better support small businesses, representing a significant but not transformative change.
reforms.source_quote: The cost of the research credit is expected to be $6.1 billion in 2001.

reforms.description: The Extraterritorial Income Exclusion Act was introduced, replacing the previous foreign sales corporation regime, allowing broader tax deductions for domestic goods produced for export.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing broader tax deductions, this act encourages domestic production and export, fostering innovation and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The act has been enacted and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: This act represents a significant overhaul of tax policy affecting international trade and domestic production.
reforms.source_quote: The law gives the same tax exemptions to goods that are produced domestically for export as to goods that are made and sold abroad by US companies.

reforms.description: The Administration established a Cabinet-level working group to develop innovative approaches to climate change, focusing on advancing science and technology while ensuring economic growth and global participation.
reforms.component_name: Cabinet-level working group on climate change
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering innovation in climate change solutions, this initiative aims to drive economic growth while addressing environmental challenges.
reforms.status_evidence: The establishment of the working group has been publicly announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to coordinate climate-related R&D but is not a comprehensive policy overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The Administration has established a Cabinet-level working group that... has been charged with developing innovative approaches in accordance with several basic principles.
